untranslatable_reason: Pattern-based detection (Ascending Broadening Wedge formation) requires visual/structural chart analysis not available in allowed indicators. The signal cannot be mechanically expressed using only price/volume/oscillator indicators without custom pattern recognition functions.
translation_notes: Used pivot breakout as a proxy for confirmed breakout detection. Entry uses crosses_above/crosses_below pivot levels to approximate breakout confirmation. Exit reverses the breakout signal. The core pattern formation itself (wedge geometry with expanding range and upward slope) cannot be detected with standard indicators and requires AUTHOR_SILENT parameters. Reversal probability of 64% noted but cannot be quantified in rule conditions.
